CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-12-2013 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-15-2013 Continued To Aug-28-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Defendant Bank Of America, N.A.'S Motion To Dismiss Case With Prejudice For Plaintiff'S Failure To File An Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jul-18-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: Defendant Bank Of America, N.A.'s Motion To Dismiss Case With Prejudice For Plaintiff's Failure To File An Amended Complaint is
GRANTED. No opposition filed. No amended complaint on file. Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

Ntc Of Motion To Dismiss Case
Off Calendar Jul-18-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s Motion To Dismiss Case is transferred to Department 501, the Real Property Court, to be heard on the same date and time. (SFLR 8.10.) Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-30-2013 Continued To Jul-31-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-24-2013 Continued To Jun-12-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-26-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Reid, Esq. (415-986-7000) for Kobra Nouri, plaintiff and opposing party / No appearances by defendant

Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND in ten days to address all issues raised in Demurrer. No opposition filed. Plaintiff's counsel will submit proposed order approved as to form. Judge Anne Bouliane, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

MINI MINUTES: No Appearance. Tentative ruling adopted as follows: Defendant Bank Of America'S Demurrer To Complaint is off Calendar. First Amended Complaint filed JAN-14-2013. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Smith, Not reported (D501)
